messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create an appetizing PowerPoint presentation for franchise owners in the Food & Beverage industry showcasing our upcoming menu rollover strategy, containing exactly 10 slides with a vibrant theme using green, brown, and orange palettes. The output filename must be "Menu_Rollover.pptx". Write all presentation content in Spanish and use 16:9 Widescreen orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping; generate all data locally based on standard F&B menu planning metrics. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# ── Deck constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN = Inches(0.75)
CARD_RADIUS = 0.12
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_HEADING = "Arial"

# Palette: green, brown, orange + supporting colors
COLOR_GREEN = RGBColor(0x2E, 0x7D, 0x32)
COLOR_BROWN = RGBColor(0x5D, 0x40, 0x37)
COLOR_ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6F, 0x00)
COLOR_CREAM = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xF8, 0xE1)
COLOR_DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN = RGBColor(0xC8, 0xE6, 0xC9)
COLOR_LIGHT_ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xE0, 0xB2)
COLOR_LIGHT_BROWN = RGBColor(0xD7, 0xCC, 0xBB)

# ── Color helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))

# ── Helper functions ────────────────────────────────────────────
def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)

def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color="#333333", alignment=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color) if isinstance(color, str) else color
    p.font.name = FONT_HEADING if bold else FONT_BODY
    if alignment:
        p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox

def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color="#FFFFFF", title_color="#333333"):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_BROWN
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    if title:
        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = title
        p.font.size = Pt(16)
        p.font.bold = True
        p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(title_color) if isinstance(title_color, str) else title_color
        p.font.name = FONT_HEADING
        tf.add_paragraph()
    if body:
        p2 = shape.text_frame.paragraphs[-1]
        p2.text = body
        p2.font.size = Pt(13)
        p2.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY
        p2.font.name = FONT_BODY
    return shape

def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=28, color="#FF6F00"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(10), Inches(1))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = True
    p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color) if isinstance(color, str) else color
    p.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    return txBox

def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(10.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(2.3), Inches(0.4))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    p.text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    p.font.size = Pt(10)
    p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN
    p.font.name = FONT_BODY

def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_GREEN
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.6))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        p.text = "Imagen"
        p.font.size = Pt(14)
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_GREEN
        p.font.name = FONT_BODY

def add_decorative_line(slide, left, top, width, color="#FF6F00"):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.06))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color) if isinstance(color, str) else color
    return shape

# ── Slide builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────
def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8E1")

    # Decorative top bar
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, "#2E7D32")
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0.5), SLIDE_WIDTH, "#FF6F00")

    # Title
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Estrategia de Renovación de Menú"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(44)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN
        title_shape.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    # Subtitle
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(10), Inches(1.2),
                 "Plan de Transición para Franquicias — Temporada 2025",
                 font_size=24, color="#5D4037")

    # Decorative line under subtitle
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(4.5), Inches(4.1), Inches(4.3), "#FF6F00")

    # Presenter info card
    add_card(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(6.3), Inches(1.2),
             title="Presentado por: Dirección de Operaciones",
             body="Contacto: operaciones@franquicia.com | www.franquicia.com",
             bg_color="#FFFFFF")

    add_footer(slide, 1, 10)


def build_agenda_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Agenda"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(40)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.3), Inches(2.5), "#FF6F00")

    agenda_items = [
        "Visión General de la Renovación",
        "Estrategia Estacional",
        "Lanzamiento de Nuevos Productos",
        "Análisis de Precios",
        "Preferencias del Cliente",
        "Cronograma de Implementación",
    ]

    for i, item in enumerate(agenda_items):
        y = Inches(1.8) + Inches(i * 0.75)
        # Number circle
        num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.2), y, Inches(0.45), Inches(0.45))
        num_shape.fill.solid()
        num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GREEN if i < 3 else COLOR_ORANGE
        num_shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        num_shape.line.width = Pt(2)
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(0.45), Inches(0.35))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        p.text = str(i + 1)
        p.font.size = Pt(16)
        p.font.bold = True
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE

        # Item text
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(8), Inches(0.4),
                     item, font_size=20, color="#333333")

    add_footer(slide, 2, 10)


def build_overview_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Visión General de la Renovación"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(38)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), "#FF6F00")

    # Left column — overview text
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5),
                 "Nuestra estrategia de renovación de menú se basa en tres pilares fundamentales:\n\n"
                 "• Actualización estacional con ingredientes frescos y locales\n"
                 "• Innovación en sabores que reflejan las tendencias actuales del mercado\n"
                 "• Optimización de costos sin comprometer la calidad percibida\n\n"
                 "El objetivo es mantener a nuestros clientes comprometidos mientras mejoramos los márgenes operativos.",
                 font_size=16, color="#333333")

    # Right column — summary card
    add_card(slide, Inches(7.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(4.8), Inches(2.0),
             title="Resumen Ejecutivo",
             body="• 35% de nuevos platos\n• 60% de recetas mejoradas\n• 15% de reducción de costos",
             bg_color="#FFF8E1")

    # Key metrics cards row
    add_card(slide, Inches(7.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(2.2), Inches(1.3),
             title="ROI Proyectado", body="+22%", bg_color="#C8E6C9", title_color="#2E7D32")
    add_card(slide, Inches(10.0), Inches(4.2), Inches(2.2), Inches(1.3),
             title="Margen Neto", body="+8.5%", bg_color="#FFECB3", title_color="#FF6F00")

    add_footer(slide, 3, 10)


def build_seasonal_strategy_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Estrategia Estacional"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(38)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), "#FF6F00")

    seasons = [
        ("Primavera", "Marzo – Mayo", "Ingredientes frescos de temporada: espárragos, hierbas aromáticas y frutas cítricas.", COLOR_GREEN),
        ("Verano", "Junio – Agosto", "Platos ligeros y refrescantes: ensaladas gourmet, ceviches y bebidas frías artesanales.", COLOR_ORANGE),
        ("Otoño", "Septiembre – Noviembre", "Sabores reconfortantes: caldos espesos, guisos y postres con especias cálidas.", COLOR_BROWN),
        ("Invierno", "Diciembre – Febrero", "Menú navideño especial: asados premium, chocolates artesanales y bebidas calientes.", RGBColor(0x4E, 0x34, 0x2E)),
    ]

    for i, (season, period, desc, color) in enumerate(seasons):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        left = Inches(1.0 + col * 5.8)
        top = Inches(1.7 + row * 2.6)

        add_card(slide, left, top, Inches(5.3), Inches(2.2),
                 title=season, body=f"{period}\n\n{desc}",
                 bg_color="#FFFFFF", title_color=color)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 10)


def build_new_products_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Lanzamiento de Nuevos Productos"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(38)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), "#FF6F00")

    products = [
        ("Risotto de Trufa Negra", "Plato Fuerte Premium", "$24.99"),
        ("Tacos de Camarón al Chipotle", "Entrada Especial", "$16.50"),
        ("Cheesecake de Maracuyá", "Postre Innovador", "$9.99"),
    ]

    for i, (name, category, price) in enumerate(products):
        left = Inches(1.0 + i * 4.2)
        top = Inches(1.7)

        # Image placeholder
        add_image_or_placeholder(slide, f"assets/product_{i}.jpg", left, top, Inches(3.8), Inches(2.5))

        # Product info card below image
        add_card(slide, left, top + Inches(2.8), Inches(3.8), Inches(1.6),
                 title=name, body=f"{category}\nPrecio: {price}", bg_color="#FFF8E1")

    # Bottom summary bar
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0), Inches(6.5), SLIDE_WIDTH, "#2E7D32")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(6.6), Inches(11), Inches(0.4),
                 "Total de nuevos productos: 18 platos | Inversión estimada en I+D: $150,000",
                 font_size=14, color="#FFFFFF")

    add_footer(slide, 5, 10)


def build_pricing_analysis_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Análisis de Precios"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(38)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), "#FF6F00")

    # Chart data: price points by category (current vs proposed)
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Entradas", "Platos Fuertes", "Postres", "Bebidas"]
    series_current = chart_data.add_series("Precio Actual")
    series_proposed = chart_data.add_series("Precio Propuesto")

    # Build chart
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(1.0), Inches(1.7), Inches(6.5), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    # Style the series
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.gap_width = 120

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(4.0), Inches(3.0),
                 "Hallazgos Clave:\n\n"
                 "• Aumento promedio del 12% en platos premium\n"
                 "• Precios de bebidas estables (+2%)\n"
                 "• Postres con mayor margen (65%)\n"
                 "• Entradas mantienen competitividad",
                 font_size=14, color="#333333")

    add_footer(slide, 6, 10)


def build_customer_preferences_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Preferencias del Cliente"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(38)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), "#FF6F00")

    # Pie chart — Flavor preferences
    pie_data = CategoryChartData()
    pie_data.categories = ["Salado", "Dulce", "Picante", "Umami"]
    series_pie = pie_data.add_series("Preferencia")

    pie_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(0.8), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.0), Inches(4.2),
        pie_data
    )
    pie_chart = pie_frame.chart
    pie_chart.has_legend = True

    # Bar chart — Dietary trends
    bar_data = CategoryChartData()
    bar_data.categories = ["Vegetariano", "Sin Gluten", "Vegano", "Keto"]
    series_bar1 = bar_data.add_series("2023")
    series_bar2 = bar_data.add_series("2025 Proyectado")

    bar_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(6.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(6.0), Inches(4.2),
        bar_data
    )
    bar_chart = bar_frame.chart
    bar_chart.has_legend = True

    add_footer(slide, 7, 10)


def build_timeline_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Cronograma de Implementación"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(38)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), "#FF6F00")

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Desarrollo de Recetas", "Pruebas internas y ajustes de sabor"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Capacitación del Personal", "Talleres en cada franquicia"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Lanzamiento Piloto", "10 ubicaciones seleccionadas"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Expansión Nacional", "Despliegue completo de la red"),
        ("Enero 2026", "Evaluación y Ajustes", "Feedback y optimización continua"),
    ]

    for i, (period, title_text, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        left = Inches(1.0 + i * 2.4)
        top = Inches(2.5)

        # Milestone marker circle
        marker = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + Inches(0.8), top - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        marker.fill.solid()
        marker.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_ORANGE if i < 4 else COLOR_GREEN
        marker.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        marker.line.width = Pt(2)

        # Connecting line (except last)
        if i < len(milestones) - 1:
            line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(1.4), top, Inches(1.0), Inches(0.05))
            line_shape.fill.solid()
            line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_BROWN

        # Card below marker
        add_card(slide, left, top + Inches(0.8), Inches(2.2), Inches(3.0),
                 title=period, body=f"{title_text}\n\n{desc}", bg_color="#FFFFFF")

    add_footer(slide, 8, 10)


def build_financial_projections_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Proyecciones Financieras"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(38)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), "#FF6F00")

    # Bar chart — Revenue projection
    fin_data = CategoryChartData()
    fin_data.categories = ["Año 1", "Año 2", "Año 3"]
    series_rev = fin_data.add_series("Ingresos (M)")

    fin_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(0.8), Inches(1.7), Inches(6.5), Inches(4.0),
        fin_data
    )
    fin_chart = fin_frame.chart
    fin_chart.has_legend = True

    # Summary cards on the right
    metrics = [
        ("ROI Proyectado", "+22%", COLOR_GREEN, "#C8E6C9"),
        ("Margen Neto", "18.5%", COLOR_ORANGE, "#FFECB3"),
        ("Tasa de Crecimiento", "+15% anual", COLOR_BROWN, "#D7CCC8"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value, color, bg) in enumerate(metrics):
        add_card(slide, Inches(8.0), Inches(1.7 + i * 1.6), Inches(4.5), Inches(1.3),
                 title=label, body=value, bg_color=bg, title_color=color)

    # Bottom note
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(6.2), Inches(11), Inches(0.8),
                 "Nota: Las proyecciones se basan en datos históricos de 5 ubicaciones piloto y tendencias del mercado F&B.",
                 font_size=12, color="#777777")

    add_footer(slide, 9, 10)


def build_closing_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8E1")

    # Decorative top bar
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, "#2E7D32")
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0.5), SLIDE_WIDTH, "#FF6F00")

    # Thank you text
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "¡Gracias por su atención!"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(48)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(9.3), Inches(1.5),
                 "Estamos comprometidos con el éxito de cada franquicia.\n"
                 "Juntos haremos crecer nuestra marca.",
                 font_size=24, color="#5D4037", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Contact card
    add_card(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(6.3), Inches(1.5),
             title="Contacto", body="operaciones@franquicia.com\nwww.franquicia.com | +1 (555) 012-3456",
             bg_color="#FFFFFF")

    # Decorative bottom shapes
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0), Inches(7.0), SLIDE_WIDTH, "#2E7D32")

    add_footer(slide, 10, 10)


# ── Main entry point ────────────────────────────────────────────
def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_agenda_slide(prs)
    build_overview_slide(prs)
    build_seasonal_strategy_slide(prs)
    build_new_products_slide(prs)
    build_pricing_analysis_slide(prs)
    build_customer_preferences_slide(prs)
    build_timeline_slide(prs)
    build_financial_projections_slide(prs)
    build_closing_slide(prs)

    output_file = "Menu_Rollover.pptx"
    prs.save(output_file)
    print(f"Presentation saved to {output_file}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
